body:
## Plan ready — BIN-125 Chapter-Aware Manuscript Editor

Implementation plan written and posted to the issue description.

**Summary:**
- Install: `npm install @tiptap/react @tiptap/pm @tiptap/starter-kit @tiptap/extension-placeholder @tiptap/extension-typography @tiptap/extension-history`
- 8 new components: `ManuscriptEditor`, `SceneSection`, `SceneHeader`, `SceneBody`, `SceneNavigator`, `RichTextToolbar`, `SceneBreak`, `InlineComment` (each with CSS module)
- `useAutosave` extended: `useAutosave(storyId, sceneId?)` for per-scene storage keys
- Per-scene storage: `story_{storyId}_scene_{sceneId}_content/snapshot/metadata`
- Migration: legacy `story_{storyId}_content` → first scene on first load
- Scene folding: instant (`transition: none`), `foldState: Record<string, boolean>` in ManuscriptEditor
- Focus Mode (Alt+Shift+F): collapses all except active scene
- Floating toolbar: appears on text selection via portal, `--z-modal` z-index

Assign to: Code Monkey

## Design Brief Complete

Design brief for [BIN-125](/BIN/issues/BIN-125) is written and appended to the issue description in `<plan>` tags.

### Summary of design decisions

- **Principle:** "The Long-Session Flow" - distraction-minimized, keyboard-first, instant fold/unfold (no animations)
- **Layout:** 240px Scene Navigator sidebar (replaces Notes placeholder) + 720px centered manuscript column
- **Rich-text engine:** Tiptap v2 (headless, ProseMirror-based) with minimal extension set (bold, italic, scene break, inline comment only)
- **Scene folding:** 3 states - expanded, collapsed (show summary), Focus Mode (Alt+Shift+F collapses all except active)
- **Persistence:** Per-scene localStorage keys with migration path from legacy single-content key; autosave per-scene on existing 2s debounce
- **8 new components**, 4 modified files, 8 new CSS modules

### Handoff

Assign to: Founding Engineer
Recovery ticket; previous BIN-124 stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled.
